title: ANC - Switch both ANC and Transparency to Off
scenario: Verify that when both ANC and Transparency are set to Off, both values are disabled/greyed out and none of the sub-options are selected for both combinations: ANC on or Transparency on.
steps: 3. Check that both ANC and Transparency values are disabled/greyed out.
4. Verify that none of the sub-options under ANC or Transparency are selected.
5. Repeat the test for the combination: ANC On and Transparency Off.
6. Repeat the test for the combination: ANC Off and Transparency On.
expected: When both ANC and Transparency are Off, both values are disabled/greyed out and none of the sub-options are selected. The same behavior is expected when either ANC is On or Transparency is On.
